data_description.device_profile: Select the matching device profile for your Zendure system. The profile contains tuned control parameters.
data_description.soc_entity: Sensor providing the current battery State of Charge (SoC) in percent. Core input for all decisions.
data_description.soc_limit_entity: Optional sensor from the Zendure integration that reports active BMS limits (e.g. charge/discharge lock).
data_description.pack_capacity_kwh: Usable capacity of a single battery pack in kWh. Multiplied by the number of installed packs to calculate total capacity.
data_description.capacity_entity: Optional sensor providing the automatically calculated available battery capacity in kWh (e.g. from the Zendure integration). If set, it overrides the manual calculation.
data_description.pv_entity: Sensor providing current PV power in watts. Used for surplus detection.
data_description.price_now_entity: Sensor providing the current electricity price (e.g. Tibber). Used for economic decisions.
data_description.price_export_entity: Sensor providing price forecast data (e.g. Tibber / EPEX). Enables price planning.
data_description.grid_mode: Choose how your grid usage is measured: one combined sensor or separate sensors for import and export.
data_description.grid_power_entity: A single sensor with positive power for grid import and negative power for export.
data_description.grid_import_entity: Sensor with current grid import power (positive values only).
data_description.grid_export_entity: Sensor with current grid export power (positive values only).
data_description.ac_mode_entity: Select entity from the Zendure integration that switches between charging (INPUT) and discharging (OUTPUT).
data_description.input_limit_entity: Number entity to set charge power in watts.
data_description.output_limit_entity: Number entity to set discharge power in watts.

reconfigure_grid.title: Configure grid metering
reconfigure_grid.description: Select the grid sensors according to the mode

data_description.grid_power_entity: A single sensor with positive power for import and negative power for export.
data_description.grid_import_entity: Sensor with current grid import power in watts.
data_description.grid_export_entity: Sensor with current grid export power in watts.

grid.title: Configure grid metering
grid.description: Select the grid sensors according to the mode

data_description.grid_power_entity: A single sensor with positive power for import and negative power for export.
data_description.grid_import_entity: Sensor with current grid import power in watts.
data_description.grid_export_entity: Sensor with current grid export power in watts.

data_description.device_profile: Select the matching device profile for your Zendure system. Control parameters will be adjusted automatically.
data_description.soc_entity: Sensor providing the current battery State of Charge in percent.
data_description.soc_limit_entity: Optional status sensor from the Zendure integration to detect active BMS locks.
data_description.pack_capacity_kwh: Usable capacity of a single battery pack in kWh. Multiplied by the number of installed packs to calculate total capacity.
data_description.capacity_entity: Optional sensor providing the automatically calculated available battery capacity in kWh (e.g. from the Zendure integration). If set, it overrides the manual calculation.
data_description.pv_entity: Sensor providing current PV power in watts.
data_description.price_now_entity: Current electricity price. Enables price-based discharge.
data_description.price_export_entity: Price forecast data for the next hours. Enables intelligent charge planning.
data_description.grid_mode: Defines how grid import and export are measured.
data_description.grid_power_entity: A combined grid sensor (positive = import, negative = export).
data_description.ac_mode_entity: Zendure AC mode (INPUT/OUTPUT). Controlled automatically by the integration.

peak_factor.name: Peak factor
peak_factor.description: Defines at which multiple of the average price a price is considered a peak. 1.35 means 35% above average. Lower values detect more peaks, higher values only strong price spikes.

state.very_expensive_force_discharge: Forced discharge due to extreme price spike

state.planning_waiting_for_cheap_window: Waiting for a cheap charging window
state.planning_peak_detected_insufficient_wind: Price peak detected, time window too short
